name: Macbook Scroll
summary: A scroll-driven MacBook laptop animation where the screen lid opens and scales as users scroll down the page.
detailedDescription: Macbook Scroll creates an interactive MacBook Pro replica that animates based on scroll progress. The component requires 200vh minimum height for scroll room, with content scaling down (35% mobile, 50% tablet, 100% desktop) for responsive viewing. Scroll tracking (start to end-start offset) drives multiple transforms: scaleX (1.2 to 1.5), scaleY (0.6 to 1.5), rotate (-28deg to 0), and translate (0 to 1500px). The lid component uses CSS 3D transforms with perspective(800px) and rotateX(-25deg) for realistic screen angle. The base features keyboard area with speaker grilles (dot grids on sides), keypad center, and trackpad. A gradient overlay fades the bottom for scroll hint. Title text animates with translateY (0 to 100) and opacity fade (1 to 0) as scroll progresses. The screen displays optional src image with gradient overlay. Colors use gray-200 for base, #272729 for dark mode, #010101 for screen bezel. Icons from Tabler represent keyboard keys, speakers, and trackpad. This creates an engaging product showcase perfect for app landing pages, portfolio pieces, or any context where demonstrating software on a realistic device enhances presentation.
purpose: Showcase applications within realistic MacBook frame
behavior: Tracks scroll progress for transform animations
Scales MacBook from small to full size on scroll
Fades title text opacity with scroll
Detects mobile for adjusted scale values
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
